category_sources: Official FreeType overview says it is a font service/library for accessing and rendering font content.
source_facts.description says Software library to render fonts.
display_name_sources: Official site title is The FreeType Project and documentation uses FreeType.
docs_sources: Official FreeType Documentation page links glyph conventions, FAQ, tutorial, API reference, design, and hinting documentation.
repo_sources: GitHub freetype/freetype identifies itself as an official mirror of the freedesktop GitLab repository, so the GitLab URL is the primary repository.
Official FreeType Development page says FreeType git repositories are available from freedesktop.org's GitLab instance and gives git clone https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/freetype/freetype.git.
tags_sources: Official documentation describes FreeType as a software library to render fonts and provides API/tutorial docs.
source_facts.description says Software library to render fonts.
